title: ServiceConnection
description: ServiceConnection schema from Palo Alto Networks Prisma Access Configuration API

id.description: Unique identifier for the service connection.

ipsec_tunnel.description: Name of the associated IPSec tunnel.

subnets.description: Internal subnets accessible through this connection.

nat_pool.description: NAT pool CIDR for source translation.

qos_enabled.description: Whether QoS is enabled on this connection.
